body:
This PR adds a simple Cartesian 2D CG passive tracer advection test case on a doubly periodic plane (with or without hyperdiffusion, with or without limiters).

It is a good baseline before expanding to 2D and 3D hybrid spaces. 
This will close #513 

PS:
I decided to call this `limiters_advection.jl`. I had left a [comment](https://github.com/CliMA/ClimaCore.jl/issues/513#issuecomment-1033179937) on the linked issue. If people agree, we could rename the others to make them consistent in a separate PR.
title: Limiters advection test case in 2D spectral space
